iso-delete.message-delete: Are you sure you want to delete the ISO {isoName}?
iso-delete.message-deleted: The ISO {isoName} has been deleted successfully.
iso-delete.message-error: Could not delete the ISO {isoName}. Please try again.

hash.message-verify: Enter the official hash to compare. Leave blank to only obtain the hash.
hash.hash-match: The hashes match. The ISO is correct.
hash.hash-mismatch: The hashes DO NOT match. The ISO may be corrupted or not official.
hash.search-database: Searching for hash in the database...
hash.message-error: There was an error calculating the hash. Please try again.
hash.iso-not-found-message: ISO not found in the database. Could not retrieve additional information.

isos.no-isos: No ISOs downloaded. Use 'Download' to add one.

url.message-error: This version does not have a valid download URL.

There is not enough space available to download this ISO.

download.title: ISO downloaded
download.message: The ISO {isoName} has been downloaded successfully.
download.message-error: There was an error downloading the ISO {isoName}. Please try again.

suggestion.title: Suggestions and Feedback
suggestion.success-message: Your suggestion has been submitted successfully.
suggestion.error-message: There was an error submitting your suggestion. Please try again.
